name: James Carville
subject: I’ll be damned if Trump isn’t pulling a real campaign together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
If this is a sign of things to come... | Friend --

I didn't think it was possible, but it looks like Trump might be pulling a real campaign together.

First, he fired his campaign manager, then he brought on a bunch of new staff, then I'll be damned if he didn't (supposedly) manage to raise $5 million in two days last week. Last Thursday, he even went almost 12 hours without sticking his foot in his stupid mouth -- mostly because he was in an airplane, on his way to putz around a golf course in Scotland for the weekend, but still.

If this is a sign of things to come, then Trump is going to be a tougher opponent than anyone thought, and I'll guaran-damn-tee you that we all better take that seriously.

Hillary's facing a huge FEC deadline on Thursday, and she needs her team, to quote our opponent, to step up "bigly."

**So, it's time to pony up and chip in (and claim your free sticker!) -- we can't let that unreconstructed bully get near the White House:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU4NTkxNDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MzYxNzUzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Give 'em hell --

Carville

|

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: It's close.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

I need your help - this is an urgent matter.

Hillary Clinton, Barack Obama, and Harry Reid will do anything
they can to divide Republicans this year. Their team wants to
guarantee a victory for the Democrats in November.

We must not fall for their tactics.

Republicans are strongest when we stand together, no matter what
the Democrats and the liberal media say.

I need you to stand with our Republican Senate team today. We
only have 1 day until our June filing deadline. That is not much
time.

Could you pitch in $15, $25, $50, or even $100 or more to help
our Republican Senate campaigns defeat the Democrats this year?
https://contribute.nrsc.org/triple-match-donation-page/?recurring=true&fname=Peter&lname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pu&utm_campaign=20160629_4878_Newt-Gingrich&utm_content=body_txt_could

Your support could mean the difference between a Republican
Senate majority and our team losing our majority to the Democrats
by one or two Senate seats. It's that close.

I need your help to ensure that we defeat all of the Democrats,
retain our Republican majority, and continue advancing smart
conservative policies.

Stand with our Republican team today, with your donation of just
$25 or more. I will personally ensure that your donation is
triple-matched by a small group of our most generous donors.
https://contribute.nrsc.org/triple-match-donation-page/?recurring=true&fname=Peter&lname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_source=pu&utm_campaign=20160629_4878_Newt-Gingrich&utm_content=body_txt_stand

Thank you for your incredible support,

Newt Gingrich

subject: setback
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
We still need to reach our goal for June | Friend --

I don’t want to be hyperbolic -- but I do want to be honest with you about where we are. And the truth is, as of today, we’re 130,000 donations short of our goal.

This goal isn’t some kind of generic oh-it-would-be-nice-to-get-there sort of thing. You know that's not how we do things on this campaign.

This is about actual projections and budget decisions: If we don’t raise what we thought we would for June before tomorrow at midnight, we’re going to have to make some difficult calls about where our funding goes in key battleground states, whether to hire more organizers or cut back, or whether to set up that next field office.

And the reason I feel so much urgency about this is because of the nature of the challenge we're up against. I've lost elections before. I know how bad that feels. But I've never worked a race where I've spent more nights sitting awake, stressed about the implications of what losing might mean. Donald Trump isn't a normal candidate, and if he beats us, it will be more than a defeat at the ballot box -- it will be a once-in-a-generation setback for our values and our shared idea of what America means.

So, I really, really don’t want to have to make choices that will make it less likely that we win in November. I don’t want to have to leave battleground states understaffed, I don’t want to have to scrap our next TV ad buy, and I don’t want to leave anything about this fight to chance.

**So chip in right now to get your free Team Hillary sticker, and let’s build the campaign that’ll have no chance of losing come November:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU4NTkwMjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MzU5NjAwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/6580114854060099584/-1192750712941574144?utm_campaign=fnd_eoq3_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_160629_fnd_gq_eoq3_act__eb)
Hi,

Did you see Andrew's message yesterday?

body:

Friend,

Late last night a new poll in Florida came out - and it's not good... **I'm in a dead heat with the likely Democratic candidate**.

I'm sure my opponent and his team are doing a victory dance right now. When I announced my campaign last week, I knew that this was going to be an uphill battle. Not only has my opponent been raising money, spreading falsehoods about me, and campaigning for a over year; but he has the support of the National Democrat money machine behind him.

[**DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN >>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36173339:sEEk4iYNK:m:1:1328517760:1FF07D85F708B48259D060D2E0D1246A:r)

Here are the facts. One week ago, my opponent was polling nearly twenty points higher than anyone else, and now, since I've announced my campaign, he's in a statistical dead heat. **I need your support right now to make certain that by the time the next poll is conducted in Florida, our team has reached every voter in Florida with my conservative message.**

[**$100 will go towards online advertising >>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36173342:sEEk4iYNK:m:1:1328517760:1FF07D85F708B48259D060D2E0D1246A:r)
[**$500 will be used for television & radio ads >>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36173343:sEEk4iYNK:m:1:1328517760:1FF07D85F708B48259D060D2E0D1246A:r)

I know I have counted on you many times before, but I know that there has never been a more critical time to stand up and fight back then there is now.

When you dissect the poll, it shows that this race is definitely going to be close, but that 63% of the "undecided" voters are aligning with me, and Friend, once we have been able to reach every voter with the truth about my voting record and values, I know our numbers are going to increase.

**[But, I can't run a winning campaign without YOU.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36173339:sEEk4iYNK:m:1:1328517760:1FF07D85F708B48259D060D2E0D1246A:r) **

[**DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN >>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36173339:sEEk4iYNK:m:1:1328517760:1FF07D85F708B48259D060D2E0D1246A:r)

No matter what state you live in, the election in Florida impacts you too. The balance of the Senate is dependent on this seat, and we cannot afford to waste any time.

We are quickly coming up on my campaign's first fundraising deadline, and I need your help to ensure we are able to report the strongest numbers possible. **[Will you follow this secure online donation link to make an instant financial contribution to my campaign?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36173339:sEEk4iYNK:m:1:1328517760:1FF07D85F708B48259D060D2E0D1246A:r)**

Thank you for your support and commitment to my campaign and our nation's future.

Marco Rubio

P.S. I have something that my opponent and the Democrat machine do not have: **YOU**. It is with your support that I will win re-election and ensure the Senate stays red. **[Please let me know I can count on you today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36173339:sEEk4iYNK:m:1:1328517760:1FF07D85F708B48259D060D2E0D1246A:r)**. Your donation no matter the size will make a huge impact, and will make certain we report the highest fundraising numbers possible.

[**DONATE >>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36173339:sEEk4iYNK:m:1:1328517760:1FF07D85F708B48259D060D2E0D1246A:r)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: When I met Russ Feingold
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Let me start by saying thank you. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4341/1c469400/634fb6f/356bd5f/2609622562/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ew-rdf-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-28_eoq8_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-28_eoq8_nd&utm_campaign=eoq8&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- Let me start by saying: THANK YOU. Thank you for all that you're doing to help my friend Russ get elected. Just like President Obama said in his email to you earlier this week, we have a chance to send a true progressive to represent Wisconsinites in the U.S. Senate. **[Right now, Russ is up against his most important deadline to date: raising $250,000 by midnight tomorrow. He doesn't have the billionaire Koch brothers in his back pocket -- he's relying on grassroots contributions to power his campaign. Can you contribute $5 right now?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4341/1c469400/634fb6f/356bd5f/2609622562/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ew-rdf-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-28_eoq8_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-28_eoq8_nd&utm_campaign=eoq8&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4341/1c469400/634fb6f/356bd5f/2609622562/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ew-rdf-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-28_eoq8_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-28_eoq8_nd&utm_campaign=eoq8&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4341/1c469400/634fb6f/356bd5f/2609622562/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ew-rdf-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-28_eoq8_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-28_eoq8_nd&utm_campaign=eoq8&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4341/1c469400/634fb6f/356bd5c/2609622562/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ew-rdf-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-28_eoq8_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-28_eoq8_nd&utm_campaign=eoq8&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

---
Let me tell you a short story about how I met Russ Feingold. Back in the mid '90s, I was a law school professor doing research on why middle class families were going broke. I heard from people who did everything by the book: They worked hard, got an education, got married, had kids, and then one major health crisis or job loss would push them over the edge.
The big banks and credit card companies had figured out a new profit model to squeeze even more out of hardworking Americans who were barely hanging on. Credit card interest rates had skyrocketed with even bigger penalties. Then, they fought to make it even harder for families to get some relief by filing for bankruptcy.
The more stories I heard about good people who were just getting slammed, the angrier I got. So, I decided to go to Washington, D.C. to see how we could fight back.
I couldn't find many open doors back then, but I can tell you: Russ Feingold was with me, fighting for working families, from day one.
**[We need Russ Feingold now, more than ever. The game is still rigged in favor of the millionaires and billionaires, the giant corporations and powerful special interests. The only way Russ can win is with your grassroots support. Can you donate $5 to help him reach his $250,000 end-of-quarter goal?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4341/1c469400/634fb6f/356bd5f/2609622562/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ew-rdf-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-28_eoq8_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-28_eoq8_nd&utm_campaign=eoq8&utm_medium=ema")**
I need more leaders like Russ fighting alongside me in the Senate -- people we can count on to stand up to the powerful. Russ isn't afraid to go to bat for hardworking American families, even if it means going against the big banks or the leaders of his own party. That's why I'm committed to doing everything I can to make sure he wins this November.
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth Warren

name: Jay Inslee
subject: What a night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
A lot has changed since I last ran for governor.

"When folks tried to weaken Washington state’s landmark civil rights law to discriminate against transgender members of the community, Jay Inslee stood up and said no, that's not right. That's the kind of governor you’ve got. And that’s why you’ve got to give Jay another four years. Because this election matters. This election matters.”

- President Obama

Dear Friend,

I have to thank President Obama for his leadership and partnership on so much of the progress we've made here in Washington state. His comments last week remind us that we have to continue fighting, that our progressive and innovative state has a role to play as a national leader, and that there is still so much more we have to achieve.

Progress doesn't come all at once. We fight for it. We stay on track. And together we break down barriers and move forward.

You're crucial to making this vision a reality in Washington. Will you make sure our reelection campaign stays on track? Contribute $5 today to make sure we hit our monthly goal of $15,000 before our official deadline, midnight on June 30.

| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
** **Media Contact:**
Ethan Latour
ethan@philscott.org
802-595-3776 **_Phil Scott Releases First Campaign Radio Ad_**
Phil Scott is releasing his first radio spot today in which he broadcasts to voters his plan to make Vermont a more affordable place to live, work and raise a family. Phil explained he is running for Governor because he’s heard from Vermonters that the state “cannot tax people any more [because] there isn’t that capacity.” After footing the bill for more than $700 million dollars in new taxes and fees over the last six years, Phil says Vermonters are tapped out. Phil elaborated that his platform to make Vermont more affordable is informed by “listening to people [and] listening to their concerns.” It is through this approach that Phil plans to rebuild Vermonters’ faith and trust in their state government. Three-term Lieutenant Governor Phil Scott is a long-time public servant and leader, beginning when he was first elected to the Vermont Senate in 2000. As the only Republican elected to statewide office, Phil has proven his commitment, determination and leadership in advocating for Vermonters and promoting policies and programs which benefit Vermont families and our economy.
**To hear the ad,_please click[here](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=79b5c52497&e=19cebfe173)._**
**Full text of Phil Scott’s first radio ad:** “I’ve always had a deep appreciation for living in Vermont. Being a Vermonter means that you’re fiercely independent, self-reliant, frugal, we make the most out of everything we have, we’re resourceful but compassionate of those that need our help. Trust and integrity are very important. Vermonters are yearning for that again. They want to trust their government. We have a responsibility. Listening to people, listening to their concerns is half the battle because their frustration arises when they don’t think anyone hears them. I firmly believe that we can’t tax people any more, there isn’t that capacity, so we have to grow the economy. We have to build that revenue in order to ensure prosperity for Vermonters.” Read about Phil Scott’s plans at [www.philscott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a8942ed2ad&e=19cebfe173).

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Donald Trump’s bizarre email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
This hit my inbox from Trump | Friend --

Yesterday, Donald Trump sent an extraordinarily long, extraordinarily bizarre email to his supporters.

I'll spare you the whole thing -- here's the part that jumped out at me:

_"The latest nasty lie from Hillary? That she is crushing me in fundraising.

This claim is laughable. I can write my campaign a check at any time (and have)." _

Donald then went on to claim his campaign broke all sorts of fundraising records last week ($2 million "IN JUST 12 HOURS") and that he'll do so again before Thursday's FEC fundraising deadline.

I'd bet a lot of that bragging is total bunk, but _it honestly doesn't matter how his fundraising is shaping up if he can make up for a complete and total lack of grassroots support with a single check._

name: Bill Cole
subject: West Virginia Strong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Friend --
Since the terrible floods ravaged our state last week, I have visited some of the hardest hit areas from Nicholas to Webster to Kanawha counties. The devastation is beyond imagination. Some people lost everything, and we lost far too many West Virginians. Our first responders have done an amazing job rescuing and helping the victims of this flooding. They have worked around the clock to help people, and we owe them a debt of gratitude for their efforts. What has been most striking to me is the strength and determination of West Virginians. Everywhere I went, people expressed how grateful they were to be alive and openly expressed how they would rebuild their lives.

I also saw West Virginians who weren’t affected coming out to help by providing much-needed supplies and aid to the victims. There are many ways to help.

Some of the organizations assisting flood victims include: American Red Cross disaster relief fund donations earmarked to "West Virginia Flood Relief" can be made [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.redcross.org%2Fdonations%2Fways-to-donate&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wv_strong&n=1). Mountain Mission contributions can are accepted [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.paypal.com%2Fus%2Fcgi-bin%2Fwebscr%3Fcmd%3D_flow%26SESSION%3D3r-VpQJX-Mhg9WTp0_zaAtURf6vnosmFIvI9jkyRj2m7jSENNg98-fvjNyC%26dispatch%3D5885d80a13c0db1f8e263663d3faee8d64813b57e559a2578463e58274899069&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wv_strong&n=2). The Salvation Army is accepting donation to the “June 2016 West Virginia Floods” [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fgive.salvationarmyusa.org%2Fsite%2FDonation2%3Bjsessionid%3D00000000.app30112a%3F13783.donation%3Dform1%26df_id%3D13783%26mfc_pref%3DT%26NONCE_TOKEN%3D0386099FD1D60712B7FB4DBD1D1B6BB1&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wv_strong&n=3).
The United Way of Central West Virginia has established a flood emergency fund and donations can be made [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsimplecheckout.authorize.net%2Fpayment%2FCatalogPayment.aspx&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wv_strong&n=4). One of the greatest things about our state is our people and our nature to take care of each other. I have been collecting truckloads of supplies at my dealerships and we are sending them to those in need. Many of the donations have come from people out of state. We should also be appreciative of the federal government stepping up and offering financial aid through FEMA. Together as West Virginians we can be proud that our state has experienced virtually no looting or other ill behavior out of this tragedy. But, I would caution anyone who wants to provide financial support, please be vigilant in making sure that you are giving to a legitimate organization as some fraud groups have popped up online. Thank you for your help at this trying time for our state. Please keep those affected most and those who lost loved ones in your thoughts and prayers as they work to rebuild their lives.
[http://www.billcolewv.com/](http://www.billcolewv.com/?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wv_strong&n=5)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Endorse our platform amendment opposing the TPP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
[**Add your name to tell the DNC Platform Committee to make sure the party's platform includes our amendment to prevent the disastrous TPP trade deal from ever coming up for a vote.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/tpp-dnc?source=em160629-v2-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/tpp-dnc?source=em160629-v2-full")
* * *
Sisters, Brothers and Friends -
Our struggle over the Democratic Party platform is about making clear that we intend to create an economy that works for all of us, and not just the wealthy and powerful.
**Now, we 've made some great progress to include a number of very important initiatives that we have been fighting to achieve during this campaign.** Major accomplishments that will begin to move this country in the right direction like breaking up huge financial institutions and enacting a 21st Century Glass-Steagall Act, a historic expansion of Social Security, taking on the greed of the pharmaceutical companies, banning private prisons, eliminating super PACs, and moving to public financing of elections, and more.
**But more needs to be done. And the most important issue is to make it clear that we must defeat the disastrous Trans-Pacific Partnership.**
So I want you to mark July 8 on your calendar - that is the next meeting of the Democratic Platform Committee in Orlando, Florida. Between now and then, **our job is to do everything we can to rally support for an amendment to the platform in strong opposition to the TPP.**
And I believe that if we all make our voices heard between now and then, we can win this fight:
[**Add your name to tell the DNC Platform Committee to make sure the party's platform includes our amendment to prevent the disastrous TPP trade deal from ever coming up for a vote.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/tpp-dnc?source=em160629-v2-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/tpp-dnc?source=em160629-v2-full")
Let me be clear: this is not about embarrassing anyone. This is about preventing the outsourcing of jobs, protecting the environment, stopping pharmaceutical companies from increasing the price of prescription drugs, preserving our democracy, and respecting human rights.
**This is about you and millions of other people making our voices heard that we need to create a Democratic Party which fights for working families and not wealthy campaign contributors.**
If we succeed, we will be in a very strong position to stop a vote on the TPP and to fundamentally rewrite our trade agreements to end the race to the bottom and lift up the living standards of people in this country and throughout the world.
That is the work of our political revolution, and you are the revolutionaries. And I believe that if we continue to stand together and fight for the values we share, we will transform the Democratic Party.
But that starts with bringing the entire party together and speaking with one voice in opposition to the Trans-Pacific Partnership:
[**Add your name to tell the DNC Platform Committee to make sure the party's platform includes our amendment to prevent the disastrous TPP trade deal from ever coming up for a vote.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/tpp-dnc?source=em160629-v2-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/tpp-dnc?source=em160629-v2-full")
It is imperative that this platform be not only the most progressive in the history of the Democratic Party, but that it includes a set of policies that will be fought for and implemented by Democratic elected officials.
I am going to do everything I can to rally support in Orlando for our amendment opposing the TPP. **But I want to be clear that if we fail there we are going to take this fight to the floor of the Democratic Party convention in Philadelphia next month.**
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/tpp-dnc?source=em160629-v2-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/tpp-dnc?source=em160629-v2-full")**

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). This is a tale of two campaigns.
Our campaign is supported by President Obama and Senator Patty Murray. Our campaign fights for all Washingtonians and for policies like raising the minimum wage and guaranteeing paid sick leave.
Our opponent is backed by the Koch brothers-funded Republican Governors Association (RGA), won't disavow Donald Trump, and opposes raising the minimum wage for Washington workers.
